title: Effects of inflation
description: Practice understanding of inflation, including understanding and calculation real interest rate.

assessment_items.question_content:
You have a savings account that earns an annual interest of $3\%$. You hear on the news that the current inflation rate is $2\%$. 

**What is the estimated real interest rate of your savings account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
To calculate real interest rate we use the formula:

$ \text{Interest you earn} - \text {Inflation rate} = \text{Real interest rate}$
We are given $3\%$ for the interest we earn, and $2\%$ for the inflation rate.
The real interest rate of your account is $1\%$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Imagine your boss gives you a raise of $5\%$ this year. However, due to economic changes, the inflation rate is reported to be $3\%$. 

**What is the estimated real increase in your purchasing power after considering inflation?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
To calculate the increase in purchasing power we use the formula:

$ \text{Your raise} - \text {Inflation rate} = \text{Real increase in purchasing power}$
The raise is $5\%$ and inflation comes in at $3\%$.
The real purchasing power of your increase is $2\%$.

assessment_items.question_content:
You decided to invest in a bond that promises an annual return of $7\%$. By the end of the year, the inflation rate turns out to be $4\%$.

**What is the estimated real interest rate you earned from your bond investment?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
To calculate real interest rate we use the following formula:

$ \text{Bond interest rate} - \text {Inflation rate} = \text{Real interest rate}$
The bond interest rate is $7\%$ and inflation is at $4\%$.
The real interest rate you earned from your bond investment is $3\%$.

assessment_items.question_content:
You have been diligently saving money in an account that earns an annual interest of $4\%$. However, you learn that the inflation rate for the current year has been $5\%$. 

**Given this scenario, what is the real effect on your savings?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Your savings account offers a $3.5\%$ fixed annual interest rate. The current inflation rate is $3.5\%$. 

**What is true of the overall value of your savings?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: There's no change in the overall value.

assessment_items.question_content:
Your emergency fund is in a savings account with a $1.5\%$ interest rate. Inflation rates are totaling $1\%$ this year.

**How does this affect your savings overall?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

After a successful annual review, your employer decides to give you a $2\%$ raise. At the same time, the inflation rate has been $3\%$ for the year. 

**Considering the inflation rate, what is the real effect of your raise?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

This year, you received a generous $6\%$ raise at work. During the same period, the inflation rate was recorded at $2\%$.

**What does this mean for your real earnings?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: You're making more money in real terms.
You're making less money in real terms.
There's no significant impact on your real earnings.

assessment_items.question_content:
You're pleased to learn that your annual salary review has resulted in a $4\%$ raise. However, the inflation rate has also been $4\%$ over the same timeframe.

** How does this affect your purchasing power?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It leaves your purchasing power unchanged.

assessment_items.question_content:
You're considering opening a savings account and want to choose one that will actually grow your money's value.

Account Name | Interest Rate | Minimum Deposit
:-: | :-: | -:
Account A | $1.5\%$ | $\$100$
Account B | $3\%$ | $\$500$
Account C | $4.1\%$ | $\$1{,}000$
Account D | $6\%$ | $\$5{,}000$

**Considering the current inflation rate of $3\%$, which account(s) would actually help your savings' value grow?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You're considering opening a savings account and want to choose one that will actually grow your money's value.

Account Name | Interest Rate | Minimum Deposit
:-: | :-: | -:
Account A | $1.8\%$ | $\$100$
Account B | $2.7\%$ | $\$500$
Account C | $3.5\%$ | $\$1{,}000$
Account D | $4.6\%$ | $\$5{,}000$

**Considering the current inflation rate of $2\%$, which account(s) would actually help your savings' value grow?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

You're considering opening a savings account and want to choose one that will actually grow your money's value.

Account Name | Interest Rate | Minimum Deposit
:-: | :-: | -:
Account A | $1.2\%$ | $\$100$
Account B | $2.4\%$ | $\$500$
Account C | $3.7\%$ | $\$1{,}000$
Account D | $4.9\%$ | $\$5{,}000$

**Considering the current inflation rate of $4\%$, which account(s) would actually help your savings' value grow?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
